name: hoc/mode-toggle-group
description: A segmented-control theme-mode selector HOC that displays Light, Dark, and System options as a grouped set of toggle buttons. Composed of ToggleGroup and ToggleGroupItem primitives with icon labels and active-state styling. Ideal for settings pages or appearance panels where all three options should be visible simultaneously for quick comparison.
useCases: Settings-appearance pages with a dedicated segmented row for theme selection
User-preference panels in productivity apps that expose layout density alongside theme options
Admin customization wizards where every visual option is presented in a uniform control style
Onboarding profile-setup screens collecting theme preference alongside timezone and language
